strengths: Extensive experience with Full Stack development across multiple stacks (TypeScript/Node.js, React, Nest.js, Kotlin/Java, Dlang)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
Strong emphasis on test-driven development (TDD), CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Primary stack (Nest.js, React, Vitest) not explicitly highlighted in recent roles; experience may be outdated or secondary
Dlang and Swift skills, while present, are not core to the required stack and may indicate outdated or niche expertise
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL/MySQL (MongoDB is mentioned but relational databases are critical for the role)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong Full Stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React, along with a novel specialization in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows). His TDD and CI/CD practices align well with the role. However, his relational database experience (PostgreSQL/MySQL) is less apparent, and his primary stack alignment with Nest.js/React/Vitest is not clearly recent. His diverse tech stack suggests adaptability but may dilute focus on the required core technologies.
